archimate:Assessment.name: Key Governance IoP Enablers
archimate:Assessment.documentation:
Definition: Key Governance IoP Enablers ABB is a Grouping enabling common understanding and implementation of interoperability across public administration and borders through decisions on interoperability frameworks, institutional arrangements, organisational structures, roles and responsibilities, policies, agreements and other aspects of ensuring and monitoring interoperability.
Source: ISA2-EIF
Source reference: https://ec.europa.eu/isa2/eif_en/
Interoperability Dimension: Governance IoP
Viewpoint: Key Interoperability Enablers viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KeyGovernanceIoPEnablersAssessment
ABB name: eira:KeyGovernanceIoPEnablersAssessment
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KeyGovernanceIoPEnablersAssessment
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: Key Governance IoP Enablers ABB is a Grouping enabling common understanding and implementation of interoperability across public administration and borders through decisions on interoperability frameworks, institutional arrangements, organisational structures, roles and responsibilities, policies, agreements and other aspects of ensuring and monitoring interoperability.
